Utagawa Hiroshige

Night Rain at Karasaki
by Utagawa Hiroshige
Edo Japan · Hiroshige · c. 1835
A woodblock print of the ancient pine of Karasaki against black rain — from Hiroshige's Eight Views of Ōmi. A moonless night rendered in the brightest possible blue.
